title: New generation, new voice, new imagination: Rahul, Kharge hail Vijay's swearing-in as T.N. CM
description: Mr. Vijay was sworn in as the Tamil Nadu Chief Minister on May 10, 2026 in a colourful ceremony attended by Congress leader Rahul Gandhi, ushering in the first non-DMK, non-AIADMK government in the southern State in 60 years
